source.title: Neural correlates of multisensory cue integration in macaque MSTd

confidence_rationale: Direct single-unit recording in macaque MSTd. Congruent/incongruent neuron populations are a hardwired biological mechanism for reafference cancellation. Well-replicated across multiple Gu et al. papers (2006, 2007, 2008). Directly instantiates the self-motion prediction → perspective-shift cancellation mechanism required by MECH-098.
